ir_specs.statement: With no arguments, hostname prints the name of the current host system.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: With no arguments, hostname prints the name of the current host system.

ir_specs.statement: With one argument, it sets the current host name to the specified string.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: With one argument, it sets the current host name to the specified string.

ir_specs.statement: You must have appropriate privileges to set the host name.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: You must have appropriate privileges to set the host name.

ir_specs.statement: hostname is not installed by default, and other packages also supply a hostname command, so portable scripts should not rely on its existence or on the exact behavior documented above.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: hostname is not installed by default, and other packages also supply a hostname command, so portable scripts should not rely on its existence or on the exact behavior documented above.
